name: flow-value-steps-replay
description: Tier 2: virtualized clock reads and random draws are journaled as value steps. On a fresh run the live value is recorded and returned as-is; after a crash and resume, the recorded value is substituted verbatim regardless of what live value is now offered — so a resumed flow observes the same 'now' and randomness as its first run (spec 4.4). Stubs skip tier-2 scenarios; the real core runs this in crates/keel-core/tests/flows_conformance.rs.
